name: RPlog_A_Valuable_Pawn
title: The Krayt in Valak's Trophy Hall
summary: Led by the rogue Dark Jedi Cort, the apprentice Simon and the girl Mira infiltrate the late Emperor Valak's torchlit trophy hall on Ord Trasi, where the redheaded Jedi Jessalyn Valios floats imprisoned in a stasis tank. Cort intends to seize Jessalyn as leverage against Luke Skywalker, but the Emperor's Hand, Lara Grayson, appears to defend her prize and a duel erupts; Cort cuts down what proves to be a doppelganger before facing the true Lara. Their lightsaber battle ranges across the chamber, escalating through a Force Scream, a thrown shard of glass, and Lara's explosive sticklers that blast open the outer wall, until Cort kicks her backward through the breach to plummet from the temple spire. Meanwhile Valak's monstrous guardian Krayt dragon stirs from the shadows and pursues Simon, who hauls the unconscious Jessalyn in a fireman's carry while Mira flees; Simon props the beast's jaws open with his staff before Cort returns and blinds the creature with the Force. With the dragon cowed in a corner, the bloodied survivors gather Jessalyn's limp body and resolve to carry her out to Cort's waiting ship before he bleeds to death.
